current_suggestion.pitch: Your health channels skew heavily toward carnivore/low-carb advocacy, and Rhonda Patrick steelmans the micronutrient, phytonutrient, and sauna/cold exposure side of longevity that Attia touches but doesn't own. She goes deep on primary literature — heat shock proteins, sulforaphane, omega-3 mechanisms, and genetic variation in nutrient metabolism — with a level of citation density that matches your preference for real data over ideology. Format is a mix of solo deep-dives and long-form research interviews with scientists like Valter Longo and Satchin Panda, typically 45–90 minutes.
